short.en: Passionate software developer with experience building web applications and solving real-world problems.
short.zh: 熱衷於軟件開發，具備網頁應用開發及解決實際問題的經驗。

full.en: Write a longer bio here — your background, what drives you, and what kind of roles you're looking for.
full.zh: 在此撰寫較詳細的自介 — 背景、動機、以及你期望的職位方向。

note.zh: 現正尋找全職工作機會
